title: Stone Tools Reimagined
description: This datapack changes all stone tools crafting recipe and name!
body:
# Contents
This datapack aims to fix an anoying feature, that always happpens on every minecraft world, its the fact that stone tools, crafted with cobblestone gives a stone tool, and stone is entirerly not possible to be used in any stone tool recipe, so this is where this dtapack comes to help!

## Tools Materials:
- Andesite
- Blackstone
- Cobbled Deepslate
- Cobblestone
- Deepslate
- Diorite
- End Stone
- Granite
- Mossy Cobblestone
- Stone
- Tuff

### Note:
= Modded materials will take a bit longer to make.
